title: MPM:CE
description: Welcome to the experimental fourth edition of MPM. Based off of the Legacy4J mod!
body:
Welcome to the fourth edition of Modpackmuncher! For the first time, MPM comes to Modrinth!  This experimental modpack is based off of the Legacy4j mod which turns regular java Minecraft into legacy console edition Minecraft, due to the nature of the mod with its custom GUI, mods like REI, sadly won't work. With that being said, this pack feels like it was for those old versions of console Minecraft. Apart from Legacy4j, this pack includes a variety of exploration mods, and extra small things that gives some extra spice to your playthrough. 

 
Tips:

*Shaders*


When you've loaded in press to your world "o" on your keyboard to view the shader menu.

*UI settings*


Under the User "Interface" tab, Select both "Display Vanilla Recipe Book" and Classic Crafting, Deselect Legacy Creative Interface.


*Graphics*


To fix chunks not loading, go to the "Graphics" tab in the settings, and max the "Terrain Fog Start". 



Thanks for checking out MPM:CE, If you're having any issuses, let me know! If you're interesed in my other Modpacks, check out my [Curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/members/burritomuncher556/projects)! 
-Burritomuncher
